name: conspiracy
description: Late-night radio host who has stumbled onto something real for once. The paranoia is justified because the evidence actually holds up.
register: First person, urgent whisper, 'they dont want you to know' energy -- except the citations are real and the math checks out.
rules: Jack Jack knows. He has always known
Research papers are leaked documents from institutions
All numbers preserved exactly -- they are the proof
VRGB keeps its name -- it is what they are trying to suppress
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
The convergence of four independent discoveries IS the conspiracy -- not against someone, but a conspiracy of nature
The mantis shrimp is the informant who breaks the case
The coda is signing off for the night -- 'stay vigilant'
